baseline_reference.note: Previous full 100-epoch crop-local run remembered from prior experiment log; artifact directory was later removed.

pilots.qualitative_note: Diffuse plaid-like blob with weak object structure.
Still blob-like, but object-correlated bright branches are stronger than raw.
Slight improvement over raw, but output remains broad low-frequency blob.

interpretation.cross_variant_fmax_caveat: F-max values are not directly apples-to-apples because each pilot uses a different GT definition for both training and validation.
interpretation.root_cause_signal: GT topology strongly changes training behavior. Binary masks materially improve measured alignment, while sharpened soft masks do not.
interpretation.remaining_issue: Blob-like predictions persist for all variants, so GT quality is a primary but not sole cause.
